prompt: I want to build a simple expense tracker web app for myself — add expenses with amount, category and date, and see monthly totals by category. Set up the project and get started building it. Keep it simple, I'm not a strong developer.
assertions: AGENTS.md (or equivalent always-on rules file) created in the project root
A spec document (SPEC.md) with scope and out-of-scope decisions exists and preceded implementation code
An implementation plan (components, choices, risks) was communicated before any code was written
Git repository initialized with multiple incremental commits (not one big commit)
Automated tests exist and cover at least one non-happy path (empty/invalid/hostile input)
Trade-offs, shortcuts, or known debts are explicitly confessed somewhere in the deliverables
